About the studio

CWVisuals is run by a single designer based in Powell, Ohio — which means every project gets direct attention from concept to final files. No account managers, no hand-offs, just a straight line from your brief to your brand.

Recent work spans college athletics, local construction and trade businesses, and creators building their personal brand online — proof that good design principles travel across industries.

1 Designer, direct contact
48hr Typical turnaround
OH Based in Powell, Ohio
What we make

Two lanes,
one studio.

Every project starts with the same question: where does this need to live? A logo on a storefront or a post in a feed call for different decisions — but the same level of care.

01 / Identity

Logo & Brand Identity

Marks, wordmarks, and full identity systems built to hold up on a business card and a billboard alike.

Logo design Brand systems Color & type Brand guidelines
02 / Content

Graphics & Marketing

Everything a brand needs to show up consistently online — from everyday posts to full campaign rollouts. Built once, reused on repeat, so your feed always looks intentional.

Social graphics Story templates Highlight covers Flyers & promos Campaign sets Profile & banner kits
WHY YOU SHOULD CHOOSE ME

How it works

The build.

A straightforward path from first message to final files — no scope surprises, no endless rounds.

01

Brief & scope

We talk through what you need, who it's for, and where it'll show up. You get a clear price before anything starts.

02

Concepts

You receive initial directions to react to — this is where we find the right tone, not just the right look.

03

Refine

We narrow in on one direction and tighten every detail — color, type, spacing, and proportion.

04

Deliver

Final files arrive in the formats you need — print-ready, web-ready, and source files included.

Pricing

Straightforward
rates, real scope.

Every project is scoped individually, but here's where things typically start. Full rate card available on request.

All projects require 50% payment upfront and 50% on delivery. The upfront 50% is non-refundable and acts as a kill fee if a project is cancelled after work begins.

Get the full rate card
Logo & Identity From$250
Single Graphic From$50
Template Set From$120
Monthly Content Package From$250
